findings.description: Path traversal vulnerability in /api/download/{filename} endpoint. The filename parameter was not validated against path traversal attacks.
findings.fix_suggestion: Validate filename to only allow simple names, resolve paths and verify they stay within the output directory.

findings.description: Path traversal / directory listing vulnerability in /api/browse endpoint. No restriction on which directories could be browsed.
findings.fix_suggestion: Restrict browsing to the application root directory tree.

findings.description: Path traversal in /api/download-all endpoint. The output_dir parameter could be set to any filesystem path.
findings.fix_suggestion: Restrict output_dir to application root directory.

findings.description: Unvalidated integer parsing in split operations. User input converted to int() without try/except.
findings.fix_suggestion: Wrap int() conversions in try/except ValueError, validate ranges and bounds.

findings.description: Path traversal vulnerability in the SECOND download endpoint (download_output). Not fixed in first audit round.
findings.fix_suggestion: Add identical path traversal prevention.

findings.description: Negative index vulnerability in merge order parsing. Only upper bound checked.
findings.fix_suggestion: Add lower bound check: 0 <= i < len(saved_files).

findings.description: Bare except: clauses throughout codebase silently suppress all exceptions.
findings.fix_suggestion: Replace bare 'except:' with 'except Exception:'.

findings.description: Error messages expose internal details via raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=str(e)).
findings.fix_suggestion: Log the exception server-side and return a generic error message.

findings.description: Overly permissive CORS configuration: allow_headers=['*'] with allow_credentials=True.
findings.fix_suggestion: Specify explicit allowed headers.

findings.description: Missing authentication on /api/status/{job_id} and /api/jobs endpoints.
findings.fix_suggestion: Add authentication or restrict job status to job creator.
findings.justification: Job IDs are random hex (8 chars = 4B+ possibilities). Endpoints expose only processing status.

findings.description: Filename not sanitized in FileResponse Content-Disposition header.
findings.fix_suggestion: Use Path().name to sanitize the filename.

findings.description: doc.page_count accessed after doc.close() in archive/invoice processing.
findings.fix_suggestion: Store page_count before calling doc.close().

findings.description: The /api/sign-pdf endpoint error handler leaked internal error details.
findings.fix_suggestion: Replace with logger.exception() + generic error message.

findings.description: is_banned flag not checked when authenticated users access endpoints. Banned user's JWT remains valid for 7 days.
findings.fix_suggestion: Add ban check in get_current_user_required().

findings.description: Error messages in routes.py expose internal details via raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=f'...{str(e)}'). All 20 error handlers in routes.py leaked raw exception messages to clients. The previous audit only fixed api.py but missed routes.py entirely.
findings.fix_suggestion: Add logger and replace all 20 instances with logger.exception() + generic error message.

findings.description: save_upload_file() has no file size validation. Many api.py endpoints call save_upload_file() before any size check, allowing arbitrarily large files to be written to disk and potentially exhausting storage.
findings.fix_suggestion: Add streaming size validation with a hard limit in save_upload_file().

findings.description: SQL column names interpolated via f-strings in ALTER TABLE statements.
findings.fix_suggestion: Whitelist column names explicitly.
findings.justification: Values are hardcoded in source code tuples, not from user input.

findings.description: SQLite check_same_thread=False in multithreaded FastAPI context.
findings.fix_suggestion: Use a connection pool or per-request connections.
findings.justification: db_session() creates new connections per operation.

findings.description: JWT_SECRET_KEY randomly generated if not in environment.
findings.fix_suggestion: Require JWT_SECRET_KEY in environment.

findings.description: X-Forwarded-For IP extraction without proxy validation.
findings.fix_suggestion: Only trust X-Forwarded-For behind known proxy.

findings.description: Admin settings endpoint accepts legacy admin_key parameter.
findings.fix_suggestion: Deprecate admin_key parameter.

findings.description: Batch processing limits file count (100) but not total file size.
findings.fix_suggestion: Add total batch size limit.
findings.justification: Individual file size limited by plan.

findings.description: Three global job-tracking dicts grow unbounded over time.
findings.fix_suggestion: Add job eviction to cleanup_old_files().

findings.description: Resource leak in detect-type endpoint: fitz.open() called inline in dict constructor (len(fitz.open(...))) without ever closing the document handle. Each request leaks a file descriptor.
findings.fix_suggestion: Store document in variable, get page count, close document.

findings.description: Flatten PDF endpoint does not actually flatten annotations. It only sets the IS_HIDDEN flag on annotations, which can be easily reversed. A proper flatten should render annotations into page content and remove them.
findings.fix_suggestion: Use redaction-based approach to burn annotations into page content.

findings.description: Import error handler in powerpoint-to-pdf endpoint leaks the ImportError exception message to clients, revealing which Python packages are missing on the server.
findings.fix_suggestion: Return static error message without exception details.

findings.description: Duplicate imports in codebase.
findings.fix_suggestion: Remove duplicate import block.

findings.description: JSON parsing with generic exception handling.
findings.fix_suggestion: Catch json.JSONDecodeError specifically.

findings.description: No HSTS headers configured in FastAPI application.
findings.fix_suggestion: Add HSTS header middleware.

findings.description: Stripe webhook signature verification depends on stripe_webhook_secret being configured.
findings.fix_suggestion: Add startup validation.

findings.description: Some public endpoints lack rate limiting.
findings.fix_suggestion: Apply rate limiting middleware.
findings.justification: Low-risk endpoints; nginx provides baseline protection.

findings.description: ZIP extraction path traversal (CWE-409) in batch split-invoices endpoint. zipfile.ZipFile.extractall() was called without validating member paths. A malicious ZIP with entries like '../../../etc/passwd' could write files outside the extraction directory.
findings.fix_suggestion: Validate all ZIP member paths resolve within the extraction directory before extracting.

findings.description: ZIP extraction path traversal (CWE-409) in archive processor endpoint. Same vulnerability as VULN-032 in the /api/batch/archive-processor endpoint.
findings.fix_suggestion: Validate all ZIP member paths resolve within the extraction directory before extracting.

findings.description: Unsanitized file.filename used in temp file path construction. An uploaded file with name '../../etc/passwd' could write outside OUTPUT_DIR despite the uuid prefix.
findings.fix_suggestion: Use sanitize_filename(Path(file.filename).name) to strip path components.

findings.description: Same unsanitized file.filename vulnerability as VULN-034 in batch invoice extraction endpoint.
findings.fix_suggestion: Use sanitize_filename(Path(file.filename).name) to strip path components.

findings.description: Same unsanitized file.filename vulnerability as VULN-034 in batch receipt extraction endpoint.
findings.fix_suggestion: Use sanitize_filename(Path(file.filename).name) to strip path components.
